title: [PATHC] Fix the Code of Conduct contact mechanism.
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: New hotline for the hive
gist.blurb: We've updated the contact details in our Code of Conduct to make sure your messages always reach the right bees.
gist.summary: Updated the enforcement contact email and attribution ladder in the Code of Conduct.
gist.impact: Community members now have the correct, up-to-date email address for reporting Code of Conduct inquiries.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a friendly community helper, interacting with a cozy mailbox in a garden. Represents communication, safety, and community guidelines.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot putting a pixelated letter into a lime green (#ecf874) garden mailbox. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot putting a pixelated letter into a lime green (#ecf874) garden mailbox. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
